title: Term 2 resumes 20 April 2026
summary: All primary and secondary schools across the district will resume for Term 2 on Monday, 20 April 2026. Head teachers are asked to submit updated enrolment figures by the first Friday of term.
body: The District Education Office confirms that Term 2 of the 2026 school year begins on Monday, 20 April 2026 for all elementary, primary and secondary schools. Head teachers must submit updated enrolment and staffing returns to the office by Friday, 24 April 2026 to support the mid-year subsidy allocation.

title: District-wide teacher in-service training
summary: A three-day in-service workshop on early-grade reading will be held at Bereina Station for all elementary and lower-primary teachers.
body: The District Education Office, with support from the Provincial Division of Education, will run a three-day in-service training on early-grade reading and phonics from 12–14 May 2026 at Bereina Station. Attendance is compulsory for all elementary and Grade 1–3 teachers. Travel and accommodation arrangements will be advised by each LLG education coordinator.

title: New classroom grants for three schools
summary: Three schools have been approved for double-classroom construction under the 2026 district infrastructure programme.
body: Bereina Primary, Waima Primary and Yule Island Secondary have been approved for new double-classroom blocks under the 2026 District Services Improvement Programme. Construction is expected to begin in the second quarter, easing classroom shortages ahead of the 2027 enrolment intake.

title: 2026 Grade 8 & 10 selection results released
summary: Selection results for Grade 8 and Grade 10 students progressing to the next level of schooling are now available at each LLG office.
body: The 2026 national selection results for students progressing from Grade 8 and Grade 10 have been released. Parents and guardians can collect results and placement letters from their respective LLG education coordinator. Any appeals must be lodged with the District Education Office within 14 days.
